output.dependency: The structured flight identifier appears to determine the scheduled arrival time. The same flight code pattern (airline code + flight number + origin airport + destination airport) is associated with the same scheduled arrival clock time across records.
The structured flight identifier appears to determine the actual or updated arrival time. The same flight code is paired with the same observed arrival clock time across records.
The structured flight identifier appears to determine the scheduled departure date/time. The same flight code is associated with the same departure timestamp string across records.
The structured flight identifier appears to determine the actual or updated departure date/time. The same flight code is paired with the same observed departure timestamp string across records.

The source/provider name appears to influence the numeric amount in the first column. Different provider names are associated with different prices for the same underlying itinerary, suggesting the provider may determine or strongly affect the quoted price.
